rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal reductions. Educ. Code §29.355 governs child eligibility for an education program based on citizenship, residency, and school enrollment. No overlap or dependency exists.
quote: A child is eligible to participate in the program and may, subject to available funding, enroll in the program for the semester following the semester in which the child's application is submitted under Section 29.356
_note: No conflict identified. The rule text addresses program eligibility criteria unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts.
